purpose: Local Russian IPA/articulation video and audio assets for SpeakRight, for user-stated noncommercial educational/open-source use.
notes: All Seeing Speech MP4 articulation videos listed here are downloaded locally and have extracted .m4a audio sidecars.
Wikimedia Commons IPA audio files that download successfully are included as extra reference audio.
Some optional Commons downloads may hit HTTP 429; equivalent required local audio exists via extracted Seeing Speech .m4a sidecars, so these are not blocking.
For public GitHub redistribution, keep attribution/license metadata and do not remove source URLs.
Russian-specific rule units still need SpeakRight-authored explanatory videos for stress, reduction, hard/soft consonants, final devoicing, voicing assimilation, and clusters.
